thinking:
**Constructing the Contact Page**

I'm now diving into building the contact page at `src/app/contact/page.tsx`. Currently, I am focused on identifying and importing necessary components. I will be utilizing confetti from `canvas-confetti`, and UI elements like `Button` and `Card` from their respective locations. I'm aiming for a visually appealing and functional contact experience.


**Designing the Contact Page**

I'm now detailing the layout of the contact page, `src/app/contact/page.tsx`. I've outlined the components: a floating navbar identical to the home page's, using absolute routes for anchors. The logo will link to `/`. The left side will feature a modern title and three key points styled with unique CSS. On the right, a light-colored card container will house the form, including first/last name fields, work email, and a number input.

ArtifactMetadata.Summary: 建立「聯絡我們」的獨立頁面，實作雙欄佈局：左側呈現繁體中文產品特色，右側包含一個高質感的聯絡表單，並在提交時附帶動畫與 confetti 彩帶特效。導覽列與頁尾皆維持與首頁一致的高端風格。

args.Description: Create the new /contact route and form with clean styling and submitting/success animations.
